title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by going to Settings > Security and selecting Reset Password.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage and filling in their details.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account by navigating to Settings > Account > Delete Account.

title: Update Email
content: Users can update their email address from Settings > Profile > Email.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two-factor authentication from Settings > Security > Two Factor Authentication.

title: Profile Editing
content: Users can edit their profile information such as name and profile picture from the profile page.

title: Password Requirements
content: Passwords must contain at least 8 characters including one number and one special character.

title: Login Troubleshooting
content: If users cannot log in, they should try resetting their password or contacting support.

title: Notification Settings
content: Users can control notification preferences from Settings > Notifications.

title: Support Contact
content: Users can contact customer support through the Help Center in the application.
